subject: refactor(pwa): extract install instructions to pwaInstructions.js
body:
Retrospective finding #4 — dashboard/js/pwa.js was 578 lines, over
the 500-line soft-limit. Missed by three audit passes because they
scoped file-size sweeps to dashboard/js/sections/ and components/
only, never running wc -l on the top-level modules.

Extracted into a new pure-data module:

  dashboard/js/pwaInstructions.js (178 lines)

The new file holds:
  - getBrowserInfo()        — UA-string parser returning { browser, platform }
  - supportsNativeInstall() — true for Chromium-based (beforeinstallprompt API)
  - supportsManualInstall() — true for Safari/Firefox (manual add-to-home)
  - getInstallInstructions() — per-browser step data for InstallInstructionsModal

After:
  dashboard/js/pwa.js:             578 → 437 lines (-141, under soft-limit)
  dashboard/js/pwaInstructions.js: 178 lines (new)

Breaking the closure dependency: the old getInstallInstructions()
closed over `deferredInstallPrompt` from pwa.js to decide whether
to show the Chrome 90-day-cooldown warning note. The extracted
version accepts `{ hasDeferredPrompt }` as an explicit parameter
instead. Header.jsx passes `installReady` (the local state boolean
seeded from getPWAState()) — same truthiness but without coupling
the instructions module to pwa.js's internal state.

Consumer changes (1 file):
  - dashboard/js/components/Header.jsx: import split across pwa.js
    (install/update lifecycle) and pwaInstructions.js (instructions +
    capability checks). getInstallInstructions call now passes
    { hasDeferredPrompt: installReady }.

Verified:
  - Build clean (879.91 KiB)
  - 63/63 tests pass (tripwire pwa.js assertion still holds —
    pwa.js still imports safeStorageGet from utils.js)
  - pwa.js still imports supportsNativeInstall from the extracted
    module for the 5s diagnostic timeout (line 360)

Tags: refactor, pwa, code-organization
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: post-audit-cleanup
Semver: patch
title: extract install instructions to pwaInstructions.js
